tagline: Solution Accelerators are now categorized as apps or notebooks.
what_it_does: Solution Accelerators in Databricks Marketplace have been reclassified from a separate listing type to being categorized as either interactive applications (apps) or code-based accelerators (notebooks). This change streamlines the user experience by consolidating offerings under familiar categories while maintaining the original content. The Marketplace serves as a centralized platform for discovering and connecting with various data assets and partner solutions.
why_it_matters: This update enhances the discoverability and usability of Solution Accelerators, allowing users to more easily find and utilize these resources in their workflows. By integrating them into the broader app and notebook categories, organizations can improve productivity and accelerate their data-driven initiatives, ultimately leading to better decision-making and innovation.
plain_summary: Solution Accelerators in Databricks Marketplace have been reclassified from a separate listing type to being categorized as either interactive applications (apps) or code based accelerators (notebooks). This change streamlines the user experience by…

capabilities.title: Unified Listing Categories
capabilities.desc: Solution Accelerators are now listed as either apps or notebooks, simplifying navigation.

capabilities.title: Access to Diverse Data Assets
capabilities.desc: Users can discover datasets, AI models, and notebooks all in one place.

capabilities.title: Partner Connect Integration
capabilities.desc: Seamless connections to partner solutions enhance the functionality of the Marketplace.

capabilities.title: Secure Data Exchange
capabilities.desc: Utilizes OpenSharing for secure and controlled access to shared data.

prerequisites: Databricks account with a premium workspace enabled for Unity Catalog.
use_cases: Data scientists can quickly find and implement pre-built solutions.
Organizations can leverage partner integrations to enhance their analytics capabilities.
Users can access both public and private data offerings based on their needs.

steps.title: Access Marketplace
steps.desc: Navigate to the Marketplace from your Databricks workspace.

steps.title: Browse Listings
steps.desc: Explore the categorized offerings of apps and notebooks.

steps.title: Request Data Products
steps.desc: Submit requests for access to desired data products.

steps.title: Utilize Partner Connect
steps.desc: Create trial accounts with partners directly from the Marketplace.

steps.title: Integrate Solutions
steps.desc: Incorporate the selected apps or notebooks into your workflows.

key_takeaway: The reclassification of Solution Accelerators enhances usability and integration within Databricks Marketplace, driving productivity for users.
